feed.title: Mercercrest Bridge Club Blog
feed.subtitle: A blog for the Mercercrest Bridge Club, mostly for results postings.

entry.title: June 16, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game. Next week is an NAP qualifier. Come play!

6 60.42 72.50 A 1 1.30(A) Mike Christensen - David Wright 2 57.92 69.50 A 2 0.91(A) Mike Ring - Shawn Abernethy 10 56.25 67.50 A 3 0.65(A) Bryan Delfs - Stanford Christie 5 55.83 67.00 A 4 0.46(A) Brian Zaugg - Liliana Diaconescu 12 55.42 66.50 C 5 1 1 0.56(B) Joseph Grill - Valliappa Lakshmanan

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260616E.htm

Common game results are available at https://thecommongame.com/NiteResults/20260616Rank.html

entry.title: June 09, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.

Congratulations to Chris and Chris for winning overall. Come join us at our NAP qualifier in two weeks.

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260609E.htm

entry.title: June 02, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.

Hope to see everyone next week! Here are tonight’s winners:

12 57.64 89.92 C 1 1 1 1.50(A) Nick Tipton - Craig Conner 2 57.29 89.38 A 2/3 0.90(A) Kim Eng - Eric Sieg 8 57.29 89.38 B 2/3 2 0.90(A) Kevin Cline - Aaron Mohrman Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260602E.htm

entry.title: May 19, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.

Congrats to our winners tonight, Adam and Chris J. 1st in the other direction were Rui and Dong.

Please come join us next Tuesday for Ray’s Birthday team game, and let us know if you need help finding teammates.

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260519E.htm

Common game results are available at https://thecommongame.com/NiteResults/20260519Rank.html
entry.summary: Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.

entry.title: May 12, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game. Next week will be an ACBL Membership game – extra masterpoints for all ACBL members who scratch in the game.

In two weeks we will be hosting Ray’s birthday party! We will run a special event for this - a BAM teams. We’ll send out a signup survey this week, and we are happy to try to pair up pairs who don’t have full teams.

Winners tonight were Dave and Cornel. Flight B winners were David and Chris. Flight C winners were Cindy and Shannon. Congrats to all the winners!

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260512E.htm

Common game results are available at https://thecommongame.com/NiteResults/20260512Rank.html
entry.summary: Thanks for coming to tonight’s game. Next week will be an ACBL Membership game – extra masterpoints for all ACBL members who scratch in the game.

entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.

Tonight’s winners are: 11 63.54 99.13 A 1/2 1.28(A) Ray Miller - Jeffrey Ford 16 63.54 99.13 A 1/2 1.28(A) Shawn Abernethy - Brian Zaugg 10 61.81 96.42 B 3 1 0.75(A) Ann Romeo - Bob Shelley 8 53.13 82.88 C 4 2 1 0.53(A) Mengyi Shan - Bryce Chen

See everyone next Tuesday!

Common game results are available at https://thecommongame.com/NiteResults/20260505Rank.html

entry.title: April 21, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.

Congratulations to all our players who did well in Leavenworth!

Next week will be a club championship - same cost and extra masterpoints!

Winners tonight were Dave Grubbs and Cornel Galer. E/W winners were Bogdan Vulcan and Aaron Mohrman.

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260421E.htm

Common game results are available at https://thecommongame.com/NiteResults/20260421Rank.html

entry.title: April 14, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game. Good luck to everyone who is playing in the Leavenworth Regional!

We will have a club championship in 2 weeks on April 28!

Congratulations to Doug and Joe - tonight’s winners.

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260414E.htm

Common game results are available at https://thecommongame.com/NiteResults/20260414Rank.html
entry.summary: Thanks for coming to tonight’s game. Good luck to everyone who is playing in the Leavenworth Regional!

entry.title: April 07, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.

Tonight’s winners were Bryant and Andrew, winning all strats, congrats! First N/S were Kim and Dave. First in B N/S were Elaine and Jim.

Remember there are Captain’s Teams this Sunday, advance sign up required.

Something came up today that I did not know, so I’m sharing the rule here. Our club runs under the Open+ chart. Even on that chart there are restrictions on what you need to open 2c. Under the Open+ chart, you must be both within a trick of game and have at least 5 A/K control points for a 2c opening to be legal. The hand in question tonight was KQJxxx KQJxxxx void void. If it’s a 2c opener for your partnership, you must alert your 2c openers, as I understand the rule.

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260407E.htm

Common game results are available at https://thecommongame.com/NiteResults/20260407Rank.html
entry.summary: Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.
